name: Spicy-Sweet Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Pace Picante Sauce and honey in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Simmer until the mixture thickens, stirring occasionally.
3. Add bite-size cubes of chicken or turkey breast (plain or smoked), cooked shrimp, or smoked sausage slices.
4. Heat through and serve in a chafing dish or shallow dish with wooden picks.
